basics.name: Jose Cancel
basics.label: Full-stack developer and digital product builder
basics.summary: Multifaceted developer focused on full-stack delivery, digital design, brand systems, and AI-enabled support workflows. I build practical solutions that improve clarity, usability, and day-to-day business operations.

work.name: Retail Manager Puerto Rico
work.summary: Delivered an AI support MVP that turned VTiger CRM cases and official documentation into a searchable internal knowledge system for bilingual troubleshooting.
highlights: Built a Supabase-backed knowledge layer, Node.js / Express / TypeScript API, and import tooling for CRM and PDF sources.
Prepared ChatGPT Custom GPT action support so management and staff could run real internal support tests.

work.name: Astrid Velez & Alliances
work.summary: Led the design and implementation of digital solutions for a Spanish-first consulting, coaching, and training business.
highlights: Built the official website and translated service positioning into a polished React, Vite, and Tailwind experience.
Supported the firm's digital infrastructure, design direction, and technology decisions for client-facing growth.
